title: List Property
description: Get or sets the string value of the specified element in the control item list.
notes:
After using AddItem to add items to the ListBox or ComboBox list, you can use the List property to get or edit the value of any of the items.

Setting a blank string, you can delete an item.
see_also:
Applies To

ListBox, ComboBox

ListCount Property

GUI Items: List Property

ComboBox, ListBox
